MSG.NAME: [ACore] ble general: l2cap general interface conn_node find fail @sdk_general_l2cap.c(51),ERROR
Core] ble general: l2cap general interface reg psm. @sdk_general_l2cap.c(73),INFO

[ACore] ble general: l2cap general interface reg psm fail: %d @sdk_general_l2cap.c(82),ERROR

[ACore] ble general: l2cap general interface credit conn req fail. len = %u @sdk_general_l2cap.c(101),ERROR
[ACore] ble general: l2cap general interface fail: %d @sdk_general_l2cap.c(107),ERROR

[ACore] ble general: l2cap general interface credit ch rx fail. len = %u @sdk_general_l2cap.c(129),ERROR
